title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you plug any Ollama-hosted model into LangChain LLM chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chat, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation starter that combines Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for local docs Q&A.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust; switch models, chat, view logs, and monitor GPU/CPU usage in the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot component that consumes Ollama’s REST API; drop-in widget for Next.js or CRA apps.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama; sync & async APIs, POJO mapping, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model replies into any channel with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM-based tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API plus Axum example server.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n community node that adds Ollama as a chat or completion provider inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for private AI assistance using local Ollama models; summarize notes, generate flashcards, and Q&A vault content.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration package letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for Ollama with .NET 8, MAUI chat demo, and NuGet package.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embeddings integration for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines and agents.

title: ollama-huggingface-space
summary: Hugging Face Space demo that runs Ollama in a Docker container behind Gradio for quick browser testing of local models.
